title: 9 Living Room Essentials: Coastal Grandmother Style
excerpt: Coastal grandmother is the aesthetic of linen slipcovers, sea glass tones, wicker, and lived-in elegance. These 9 picks capture that unhurried, collected-over-time feeling without the decades of hunting.
author: At Home Plans Team

pinterestPins.headline: Coastal Grandmother Living Room
pinterestPins.subCopy: 9 essentials for that unhurried, collected look

body:
Coastal grandmother isn't a trend — it's a feeling. It's the living room that smells like salt air and old paperbacks, where everything is slightly faded in the best way, the sofa has a washable linen slipcover, and there's always a wicker basket holding something useful. The palette is soft: seafoam, sand, warm white, and the occasional dusty blue. Nothing matches perfectly; everything belongs. These 9 picks build that aesthetic intentionally, without waiting thirty years to accumulate it.

## Shop the List

- [Linen Slipcover Sofa (Soft White or Sand)](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-86872014)
- [Wicker or Rattan Coffee Table](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-81374025)
- [Jute Area Rug](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-82201445)
- [Sea Glass Blue Throw Pillow Set](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-88012314)
- [Woven Wicker Storage Basket (Large)](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-91201554)
- [Ceramic Vase (Seafoam or Cream)](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-88410025)
- [Linen Roman Shade or Curtain Panel](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-82553722)
- [Driftwood-Style Photo Frame Set](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-83201554)
- [Soft Cotton Throw (Natural or Blue-Grey)](https://www.target.com/p/-/A-90323608)

---

*A coastal living room needs the right layout as much as the right pieces. A scaled floor plan helps you position the sofa and rugs before you commit. Find downloadable living room plans at [athomeplans.com](https://athomeplans.com).*
